flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mission University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.9k → $16.9k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Mission University rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($23.6k → $26.2k).

flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mission University rose 109% between 2021 and 2024 (15.9% → 33.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mission University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).
